title: Enderite Overhaul +
description:
Enderite upgrade = new material , Armor + weapons + tools!
MOBS , BLOCKS,  KATANAS UPDATE
Rideble Dragon update
body:
# This Datapack adds new progression from Netherite!
# NEW ENDERITE ARMOR , TOOLS, WEAPON, ENCHANTS, BLOCKS, MOBS, LOOT! (armor with its own detailed abilities)
**COMPATIBLE WITH EVERY DATAPACK**

Owner: msMisterR.
Idea helper: wwiiiskasss

**Check wiki for all info and easy navigation** [<wiki click>](https://boom-pixie-910.notion.site/Enderite-Overhaul-Datapack-Project-Wiki-8dd13133776c4e41ab23b8491f317801)


!Available on any version 1.21.x!

!New Update Coming in March!

Very helpfull at lategame, but not overpowered !

All loot has its own description that helps to get or understand certain things.

## List of new things:

**all added items :**

![All](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17a4376b8e9c69b85555d713d65a134fdcd49af4_0.webp)

![ALL V.22](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fab36ad906762179f9d266be83fd12884a731c7.webp)

![ALL](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8033b4ab9d20579d3a4e66923cc8198f31b85d86.png)


**Crafts:**

![Smithing crafts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67b001b3a3297d726633953235ef476a1c5c8660.gif)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-  **Dragon Scutes** - new drop from Ender Dragon, dropping from 4 to 10(More drops with looting enchantment)
   They can be duplicated using 7 Formless Scute Shards + 1 end crystal above it in crafting table.
   They are needed to make Enderite Fragment.

![Dragon scute duplicating](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b87729823fa3237e15ba1877314689c91b3c86f.png)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-  **Enderite Fragment** - new strongest material. It is needed to upgrade netherite armor/tools/weapon in smithing table. To make Enderite Fragments you need 1 Dragon Scute + 4 Echo Shards + 4 Cooked Chorus Fruit.

![Enderite ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9533e9a0dff4f4c3a5f02640c9841eac6bce4292.png)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-  **Enderite upgrade template**- new upgrade template. It is found in End cities and End ships , as rare as smithing template that also can be found there. It is needed to upgrade netherite armor/tools/weapon in smithing table.(can be duplicated as all templates, but using enderite)

![upgradeEnd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3760e0e4294bcb9def2eaf1bffbf9face068f6c0.png)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


-  **Elytra upgrade template**- another new upgrade template. It can not be found, but it can be crafted using Enderite upgrade template, dragon scutes, and enderite fragment .

**It is used to combine CHESTPLATE AND ELYTRA**

![Elytr_upgrd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5962257ed719da5d890368ba20f62d686d885bb.png)


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

4. **UPGRADED WEAPON** : Axes and Swords with new upgrade are having now: +1.3 Attack range , +2 attack damage, +0.1 attack speed.

All Enderite tools and weapons has 2538 durability (+500 from Netherite)

![Sword Duplication](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/526e45a4555e0f580cbf300b12ccafce15a72b0f.png)

5. **UPGRADED TOOLS** : ALL netherite tools with new enderite upgrade are having now: +1.3 block interaction range , +1 attack damage, +1 attack speed.
- **Enderite hoe also gives you +0.5 LUCK**

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
### Enderite Bow!

![Enderite Bow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad8b6e1985f4f396c5d5d1dab596f6f12de7c776.png)

**Now you can upgrade your BOW!**

_inspired by twin bow from Minecraft Dungeon_

**Bow stats:**

- Increased Damage!

- Always shoots 2 arrows , instead of one, because its now a twin bow!

- After succesfull shot at the enemy, there is 30% chance to give them negative effect (slowness, levitation)

- 50% chance to pierce through 3 enemies!

- slightly faster movement when crouching !

- 5% chance to summon endermite :
-  - under the enemy 
-  - under you 
-  - ontop of the block where arrow landed!


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### ENDERITE CROSSBOW

![cross](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/098c287c5382a7ddd4648e9bcdb84d8a0d2c12b4.png)

**Enderite Crossbow stats:** 
- Always shooting 3 arrows, with Multishot enchantment shoots 5 Arrows!
- Increased Damage!
- Can pierce through 5 enemies without enchants, and more with enchant
- After succesfull shot at the enemy , you will get 1 out of 3 random positive effects(Speed, Jump Boost, Slow Falling)
- 20% chance for every shot for arrow to make an explosion that only damages enemies at 4 block radius.
- 10% chance for every arrow to make a cloud of levitation
- 5% chance to summon endermite :
-  - under the enemy 
-  - ontop of the block where arrow landed!

-----------------------------


# Shield Upgrades

**Now You can make Enderite Shield and Enderite Shield of Undying**


![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ca5ffe2c27bf71d513977794ee04b879149ca62_0.webp)

**Enderite Shield Statistics:**
- Enderite Shield  durability -> 600
  
- When you get damaged while holding Enderite Shield , you will affected Strength for 5 sec

----------

**Enderite Shield Of Undying** - is the same as Enderite Shield, but also can save you from Death !

- If you die -> you will revived like totem of undying, but you will get Levitation Effect, Slow Falling Effect and Regeneration effect!

Craft of totem template(Enderite, Totem, Enderite Upgr) find on wiki(after 25 october wiki will be updated)






-----------------------------------------


**NEW ARMOR** : (_All armor is obtained by using smithing table with enderite fragment, enderite upgrade, and netherite armor_)
-    **Scale End Helmet** - _Helmet that has some power of shulkers..._ It scales you to fit in 1 block_(like shulkers do)_, it is also increasing your block reach!_(With enderite leggings equiped your gonna be much like default size(by 0.1 higher))_
-    **End Chestplate** - _Chestplate that has some power and some health of Ender Dragon..._ It gives you 1 more heart when you wearing it, it increases your attack damage(+0.5 hearts), it is also increasing your attack reach!
-    **Scale End Leggings** - _Leggings with some power of Endermans..._ It scales you to 2.8 blocks tall in summary _(like Endermans tall)_, it is also increasing your Movement speed(Swifty very close as enderman)!_(With enderite helmet equiped your gonna be much like default size(by 0.1 higher))_
-    **End Boots** - _Boots of lightness..._ It gives you some lightning , by slightly changing your gravity, so you can jump a little bit higher, and falling a little  bit slower. It is also increasing your jump height so you can jump 2 block high!
  
![UpgradingEnd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46961dc96e2f96e651f901c413140928460580b0.png)

All Enderite armor has **+50 durability** from netherite:

- Enderite helmet : 457
- Enderite Chestplate: 642
- Enderite Chestplate-Wings: 600
- Enderite Leggings: 605
- Enderite Boots: 531


**Chestplate-Elytra Upgrade** - Now you can combine elytra and chestplate!:

![Elytra](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/491630c6d319365a80a7eb0e13b6ab889f93f5ea.png)

**Tools and armor:**

![Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6bec03befa441f66822d311a41cd6c1352f324d9.png)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### KATANAS !


**Light Enderite Katana** - **MAIN IDEA FOR FAST ATTACKING AND FAST MOVEMENT** - Has 5 Attack damage , BUT has 2 attack speed(which is very fast), and makes you lighter(through -0.04 gravity when you hold it)
Also gives high Running speed and higher jump when holding it in offhand.
(Bonus for both katanas - increased attack range, and default step high +1)

CRAFT:

![Enderite katana craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0aca68f56ada446e0aa3cced4ce788746cdf141.png)




description and stats:

![Enderite Katana](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f743dadd7c59bc969d248adc254cf73a4d0f8407.png)

Enderite Katana: 2000 durability

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Knockback Katana** - **MAIN IDEA FOR SNEAKY ATTACK OR KNOCKBACK TO RETRIEVE FROM ENEMIES** - Has 6 Attack damage and 0.3 attack speed, all of that because of very big knockback(4 blocks)
Also gives high crouching speed(as truly ninja) and higher jump when holding it in offhand
(Bonus for both katanas - increased attack range, and default step high +1)

CRAFT : 

![Knockback Katana craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9244abe1dd6d0110218d53b0f9ff2d067bb3f2b.png)


description and stats:

![Knockback Katana](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e64a1225da556e50efc224f3a79c4d03e18f6601.png)

Knockback Katana: 1000 durability

------------------------------------------------


### Durability Buffs:

All Enderite tools and weapons has **2538 durability** (+500 from Netherite)

All Enderite armor has **+50 durability** from netherite:
- Enderite helmet : 457
- Enderite Chestplate: 642
- Enderite Chestplate-Wings: 600
- Enderite Leggings: 605
- Enderite Boots: 531

Katanas Durability changes:
- Enderite Katana: 2000 durability
- Knockback Katana: 1000 durability

--------------

# NEW MOBS

**End Defender**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef3b953faac14c447a42a81c520d2c57f04c6bd6_0.webp)

- New Scary Hostile mob - will always attack you
- Stats:
    - Has strong damage, and very powerfull knockback ( to knockback you away from cities or islands)
    - Very fast - it will be faster than player running
- Always spawns equiped only in unique purple Enderite Chestplate
- Spawn:
    1. Spawns near Obsidian Pillars on the main Island of the End
    2. Spawns near and also in End Cities
- Drop:
    
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2979dc8c692d2d60c5f4176b2cc2b710d7e454b1_0.webp)
    
    - Popped Chorus Fruits
    - Shattered Echo shards
    - Formless scute shards
    - Essentialures

---

**Jumper:**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca451143b2c49ef0b51f6bcb6cb988c3c5737e26_0.webp)
- New Slime-alike mob
- Hostile - will always attack you
- Dashes very fast in players face - piersing through
- [<can very rarely spawn Jelly Block>](https://boom-pixie-910.notion.site/294bcdd2ec9880c4a640e06484ede9b4?pvs=25#294bcdd2ec9880bf9607ca73ebd9eb77)
  
- Spawn:
    1. Spawns in Chorus Forests (Basicly near any chorus plant in end)
    2. Spawns near and also in End Cities
- Drop:
    
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2315891174156b6963d969e149213ff615dbecd_0.webp)
    
    - Jelly Balls
    - Formless scute shards
    - Essentialures
    

---

**Dragonie the ship defender:**

- Hostile flying mob -will always attack you
- Spawns always near end ships
    
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9153cf060578975d479a0590905f20758978d0a4_0.webp)
    
- Will never leave End Ship
- Type attack:
    - preparing and quick dash with multiple bites

- After attacking grants players with darkness effect (you will only see dragon and the ship)
    
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8f526add006335a18e8abc2974729d43fe9a2e8_0.webp)
    
- Drop(lesser version of Ender Dragon drop):
    
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83d2e7e2f5d39a0ad8a9958f998638634222972d_0.webp)

**(!HAPPY DRAGON EGG AVAILEBLE IN VERSION 22 OF DATAPACK!)**
    
    - Dragon scales
    - essentialures
    - formless scute shards

---
## New BLOCK:


**Jelly Block**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fe8bfc9640b7780b8870ca352f52811a2506cbf_0.webp)
- New Slime-like Block!
- Has a unique ability: When any entity jumps on top of it, they receive powerful levitation for 1 second, boosting them up to 10 blocks high. Can be used for parkour, builds, elevators, and mob farms
    
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09c72a0a8f18a164562b6227dc02d96fd1b429da_0.webp)
    
- Craft:
    
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80dd6a5363a8a6a76431dc89d96af8c1988aaa62.png)

- Uncraft:
    
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/506cd1e954d0cb08315e3abc2702150f8275861e_0.webp)
    
- Jumpers can very rarely place a glowing Jelly Block with a chorus plant underneath it if there is end stone below them, replacing the End Stone
    
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d797da869904755fa511b6c49cef27594e57da5_0.webp)

**Showcase Of the Jelly Block and what can you do with it**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/P8xYCcTkPpI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

-----

## HAPPY DRAGON EGG AND HATCHING SYSTEM
**Happy Dragon Egg:**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e0b433acdaabe9cc5fb26e7451a68369fbd08d2_0.webp)

- A Happy Dragon Egg drops when a player kills Ship-Dragonie.
- The Happy Dragon will hatch in 10 minutes, but only if the egg is placed on Crying Obsidian.
- After 5 minutes on the Crying Obsidian, the egg will crack slightly - this shows that half the hatching time has passed.
    
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/358fbf88b58ef5186c0d4e98ee2d7333661057f9_0.webp)
    
- If Happy Dragon Egg is not placed on Crying Obsidian it will never hatch
- Ender Dragon Egg and Happy Dragon Egg:

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1cc7146a0cc5d284ce87656a0d84c478bad8be5c_0.webp)

-----



## **Happy Dragon - NEW RIDEBLE FRIENDLY MOB**

 [<Hatches from Ender Dragon Egg>](https://www.notion.so/New-Blocks-coming-soon-294bcdd2ec9880c4a640e06484ede9b4?pvs=21)

 You can ride it by 2 players in one time
- 1 Driver seat
- 1 Passanger seat
 
Whoever rides it will be granted Night Vision and slow falling

 Faster than happy ghast
 
 Has 40 hp
 
 [<Has Toggle system for admins for its behaviur>](https://www.notion.so/All-toggles-for-admins-291bcdd2ec9880958999c17ac6ca689f?pvs=21)
 
 Can damage - Eat Hostile Undead Mobs
 
**Has 4 different states and animations:**
- - 1- Flying : when someone rides it , can eat undead mobs
        
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7268e28fdfcd6aae9ccdd4951656516afe1f76ea_0.webp)
        
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe70fabbb5c87fd7079f40e9946f994c3841b059_0.webp)

-  - 2- Hovers: Hovers in one place, when no one rides it, but someone is staying on top or sitting only in passanger seat
        
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e94d80bd70a97984db8d9f865a00a7cd23d1347d_0.webp)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e9c661cf632dea0d684e1947ffcc79b90147e8e_0.webp)
        
-  - 3- Landing: slowly decreasing when no one rides it
    
-  - 4- Sitting: when no one rides it cannot move
        
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a7fe1a6fb967ef56a2b9c75af4f0c8e483f07b7_0.webp)
        
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ee20e61086ced3e84884a163a68bf53ed5e6437_0.webp)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/338f0a3b47e01f569bae1fe615ef9f89415a9b75_0.webp)
        
- Drop:
-  - Happy Dragon Egg
-  - Bones
- Has unique auto-sitting system (can off this through [toggle system](https://www.notion.so/All-toggles-for-admins-291bcdd2ec9880958999c17ac6ca689f?pvs=21)):
- - Whenever player comes close to it, he will automatickly sit on it




--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### The Phantoms is no longer useless!!!

 **Essentialures - IS NEW OBTAINABLE INVISIBLE LIGHT SOURCE and is needed to craft KNOCKBACK KATANA and craft Dragon breath !**

 ![Essentialures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/394e6fbd2d6abde429a2e2e96659d9fe8c1b82f2.png)

      
- Dropping commonly from Ender dragon
- Dropping slightly rarely from shulkers
- Dropping slightly rarely from Endermites
- Dropping rarely from Phantoms 


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**FORMLESS SCUTE SHARDS - IS NEW SCUTE-DUPLICATION RESOURCE and is needed to craft BOTH KATANAs !**

   ![Formless Scute Shards](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fdbc2d04d1c7d93d86f0b8e7ecaee61eb9042e5e.png)


- Dropping commonly from Ender dragon
- Dropping slightly rarely from shulkers
- Dropping slightly rarely from Endermites
- Dropping slightly rarely from Phantoms

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


**With formless scute shards you now can:**
1. Duplicate armodillo scutes 
2. Duplicate Phantom membrannas
3. Duplicate Ender Dragon Scutes
4. Duplicate turttle scutes
5. Duplicate shulker shells ( it's  not that easy )
6. And craft both katanas

**Reworked duplicating in V-2.5 Dragon scutes**

![Dragon scute duplicating](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b87729823fa3237e15ba1877314689c91b3c86f.png)

**NEW SCUTE DUPLICATING SYSTEM:**

![DuplicatinScutes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/548f57d1f1a9c6229b06c607907b2dc296bc6b46.gif)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


## !Gravity Bomb!

**New weapon or projectile - Levitation Bomb**

![levi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b9e3aa6006299b5598c5928597d76c428183459.png)

- Crafted from essentialures and formless scutes

**You can throw it anywhere**, and it will make explosion(that doesnt brake blocks) and after explosion there will be levitation cloud in radius 4 blocks , everyone who will be in this cloud will be affected by levitation 5 lvl, and then affected by slow falling!

-------------------------------------------------------


### Items and Food:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95b7678b0797f82c8e32905e4f8d7829f56fe356_0.webp)

**Jelly Ball**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f206f141bfe74ea44404a6267d3d7e08e92854f7_0.webp)

- Drops from [<Jumpers>](https://www.notion.so/New-Mobs-coming-soon-294bcdd2ec988052a485d1b809b2d666?pvs=21) and can be crafted from [<Jelly Block>](https://www.notion.so/New-Blocks-coming-soon-294bcdd2ec9880c4a640e06484ede9b4?pvs=21)
- Grants jump boost and slow falling for a few seconds
- can always eat
- Gives 2 nutrions and 2 saturation

---

**Jelly bowl**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7c6b012ca73e2e81fdd8c835b210dd7a85ca31a_0.webp)

- Grants 2 lvl  jump boost and slow falling for a more seconds than just Jelly Ball
- Gives more nutrions and more saturation than just Jelly Ball
- Craft:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f41fa5f086a905ec87784ef7ecea3cdaf97b34d_0.webp)
    

---

**Powered Chorus Fruit**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df29c56c2fc6c2d67ec6e2a384a76a929538543a.png)


- Can only be crafted
- Has 3 times larger radius of teleport from chorus fruit
- Grants glowing effect when eating
- Craft:
- ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f99bf8818c9a64a2ade2ab12a80294bcbf1c60f_0.webp)

-----
**Shattered Echo Shards**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da7d01ea524c9f6982ac8618df07de415a987e4b_0.webp)

As this mod for crafting Enderite requires rare material - echo shards , this update adds not easy renewability for it.

- Now Shattered Echo Shards Drops From WARDEN up to 10.
- And Drops from End Defender up to 4.

- 4 Shattered Echo shards combines in 1 Echo shard in crafting table

------------------------------------------------------

### NEW LOOT:

**NEW ENDER DRAGON LOOT:**

![dragon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0430380dc3730579938b75f1d2bae2d001a05f9.png)

**PHANTOMS ARE NOW USEFULL**

UPGRADED PHANTOM LOOT:

![phantom loot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91e5960916228054d93793fb6b790542eecde872.png)

UPGRADED SHULKER LOOT:

![shulker_Loot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/747621b1e283ddd348fb335f2d2116b4076059c3.png)

![endermite loot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f0d16a35aee2ee108dd87501f3645b7ab188ab0.png)


-------------------------------------------------------


## New Enchants

-------------------------------------------------------
- **Berserker spirit** : Always Blindness and Strenght effects
  (strenght effect lvl depends on enchant lvl)

(**Axes. Max: 3 lvl**)

-------------------------------------------------------
- **Cricket** : After Hitting an Enemy , grants you jump boost for 5 seconds
(effect lvl depends on enchant lvl) 
  
(**Axes , Mace. Max: 3 lvl**)

-------------------------------------------------------
- **Thor Power** : When rain or Thunder, hitting floor with an mace will summon lightning bolt but will brake your mace in half.

  (works only in overworld)

(**Mace. Max: 1 lvl**)

-------------------------------------------------------

- **Echolocation** – When you in caves or under blocks (can`t see the sky) Increases movement speed, jump height, and allows automatic climbing up to 2 blocks also Grants Darkness (helmet).

------------------------------

- **Rush(Lunge)** – Grants a burst of speed after dealing damage. Speed increases with each level. (Max: 3, Weapon)

------------------------------

- **Parry** – Grants a burst of speed after taking damage. Speed increases with each level. (Max: 3, Chestplate)

------------------------------

- **Night Repair** – Automatically repairs items at night.

------------------------------

- **Fire storm** – Very long reload time, but shoots multiple piercing flaming arrows. (Crossbow only)

------------------------------

- **Pyro Curse** – Has a chance to explode when the item loses durability.

------------------------------

- **Curse of Fire** – Has a chance to set you on fire when the item loses durability.

------------------------------

- **Curse of Clumsy** – On bows: has a chance to consume 1–4 arrows per shot at level I, and 2–5 arrows at level II. (Max: 2, Bow)

------------------------------

- **Unsucsessfull Experience** – Prevents you from gaining experience while holding or wearing this item.

------------------------------

- **Curse of Night** – Items break faster or may shatter during the night.

------------------------------

- **Curse of Blindness** – Inflicts blindness while holding an item with this enchantment.

------------------------------

**18th OCTOBER UPDATE is coming! - New Items , new mobs, new loot, rideble friendly mob with bunch of mechanics, agressive and passive mobs with own unique loot!!!**

for reporting any bugs or if you have idea how to improve this pack - let me know. My contacts : maks317st@gmail.com

**IF USING THIS DATAPACK WITH OTHERS IT IS BETTER TO MERGE THEM AND THEIR RESOURCEPACK IN ONE, but its not required**
[https://weld.smithed.dev/](https://weld.smithed.dev/)

_This datapack was inspired by : datapack-dino_enderite, resourcepack-KSEPSP , datapack-Valiance ._

**WORK IN PROGRESS:** New structures for 1.22 , new mobs, new loot

**DISCLAIMER** : THIS DATAPACK USES COMMAND BLOCKS IN RECIPE, USE WITH CAUTION WITH OTHER DATAPACKS THAT DO THE SAME THING! For good working it is better to merge them.

_**DISCLAIMER **: This is overhaul and redesign and whole recoding old Dino-Enderites datapack with my new additions .
My datapack ported to new version with whole new system and new code and new abilities._
